title: Snowballs Plus
body:
## What does this pack do?
This datapack re-adds the ability for Snowballs to do damage again. The pack also includes new achievements and items related to Snowballs.

### Additions:
- Snowball Damage (1/2 Heart)
- Hard Snowball Damage (1 Heart)
- New Crafting Recipe's for the "Hard Snowball"
  - 2x2 Crafting (Snowball + (Cobblestone or Deepslate)) - Shapeless 
  - 3x3 Crafting (Snowball + (Cobblestone or Deepslate)) - Shapeless 
  - Drop Crafting:
    - Drop a Snowball + (Cobblestone or Deeplate) near each other to craft
- New Achievements
  - Starts with picking up a Snowball!

### Resource Pack:
-This Datapack is meant to be used with "Snowballs Plus: Resource Pack" which adds a new texture for the "Hard Snowball"

### Usage
-Place the datapack in your "datapacks" folder in the world of your choice or the world your server runs on.
-Do a "/reload" command to make sure the pack loads.

### Datapack Showcase:
[https://youtu.be/sxwNSXFKMbg](https://youtu.be/sxwNSXFKMbg)


*Feel free to modify the pack in any way you want!*
